title: MixVanilla
description: Uses the new coloring style to recolor old Minecraft textures!
body:
Since Minecraft Java Edition 1.14 and Bedrock Edition 1.10.0, the default look of Minecraft has changed dramatically.
The old textures have have mostly been replaced.
Although mojang provides us with the Programmer Art/Classic Textures resource pack, lots of people still have ideas like these...

- New blocks and items don't have the old style textures.
- I like the new texture's coloring style, but I don't like the outline.
- I like both the new and old textures, and it's hard to choose.

If you also have these ideas, then congratulations, this texture pack may solve your problem!
This resource pack uses the new coloring style to recolor old textures.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/lQdu0swDw-M" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**You can:**

- √ Unpack texture packs for learning purposes;
- √ Modified for personal purpose.

**You must not:**

- × Publish the modified texture pack to the web or republish this texture pack without permission; 
- × Use the textures from this texture pack in other texture packs and publish them privately;
- × Claim that you own or profit from this texture pack;
- × Add this texture pack to your homemade Minecraft client.
